creator: pvoigt@uos.de
text:
The status of this PR is "Closed FIXED" and I am wondering, if the fix is already in www/firefox 37.0,1 (31 Mar 2015 22:15:16).

I am on 10.1-RELEASE (amd64) and I still have the same error as initially posted by rozhuk.im@gmail.com.

Could anybody please clarify, if this PR is indeed fixed and if I should be able to currently build latest www/firefox 37.0,1 (31 Mar 2015 22:15:16).

Regards,
Peter
